Product Details
V-Rings

Flexible axial seals designed to protect rotating shafts from dust, splash, and contaminants.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

V-Rings

An efficient sealing choice for rotating equipment requiring compact structure and easy installation.

CHX V-Rings provide contact sealing at low friction while helping shield core components from environmental contamination.

Shaft Protection

Helps prevent water, dust, and debris from entering rotating assemblies.

Easy Installation

Elastic structure allows simple mounting without complex machining.

Low Friction

Suitable for rotational applications where reduced wear is important.
